---
name: "Frontend Request"
about: "Request a new frontend feature or UX improvement in the web console UI"
title: "[REQUEST] "
assignees: ""
---

### Summary

Provide a clear and concise description of the request, and update the title of the ticket.

- **Area of the app**: (e.g. Composer, Inventory, Settings)
- **Type**: (feature / UX / performance / accessibility / other)
- **affected versions**: (which iso versions need this feature/update?)

### Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem you’re trying to solve or the use case that motivates this request.

### Proposed Solution(s)

Explain what you’d like to see changed or added in the UI.

### Impact

Is there an impact expected on existing features/workflows/user-groups?

### Additional Context

Add any other context, sketches, links, or implementation notes that might be helpful for the frontend team.
